title: Repository Repair, Release, and Collaboration Capstone · Graph Retrieval
summary: Recover and ship a repository containing mixed work, a conflict, a mistaken commit, a remote update, and a release deadline. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Capture repository boundaries, config origins, current operation, worktree/index state, graph, remotes, and recovery refs before repair.
Order preservation, reproduction, local repair, tests, history cleanup, and publication from least to most irreversible.
Coordinate rewritten history, conflicts, ownership, release changes, and recovery instructions with explicit affected refs and people.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review repository incident combines mixed work, divergent refs, one conflict, an incorrect public commit, and release v4.0. Preserve recovery refs, repair the least destructive layer, and verify graph plus tree. Competency probe: Publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands.

Inspect the Handoff Runbook trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands.

content.text: For Handoff Runbook, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Handoff Runbook precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: A review repository incident combines mixed work, divergent refs, one conflict, an incorrect public commit, and release v4.0. Preserve recovery refs, repair the least destructive layer, and verify graph plus tree. Competency probe: Publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Experienced contributors do not need repository-specific recovery documentation.

stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

Preserve recovery refs, repair the least destructive layer, and verify graph plus tree. lines.label: risk
lines.text: Experienced contributors do not need repository-specific recovery documentation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands. Artifact under review: a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Handoff Runbook, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Handoff Runbook record says a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Handoff Runbook without its stated preconditions, omit the a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Handoff Runbook for a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio.

options.text: Inspect repository boundary, config origin, current operation, worktree, index, refs, and graph for the review Repository Triage case

Verify status, staged and range diffs, graph, tests, remote target, and recovery path for the review Repository Triage case

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Handoff Runbook: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review repository incident combines mixed work, divergent refs, one conflict, an incorrect public commit, and release v6.0. Preserve recovery refs, repair the least destructive layer, and verify graph plus tree. Competency probe: Publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands.
steps.why: Retrieving Handoff Runbook through the concrete a complete Git foundations evidence portfolio case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Publish an accessible repository runbook covering setup, workflow, gates, release, recovery, and escalation with tested commands.

hints: Name the Handoff Runbook precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.
